results.title: Black Queens to face Super Falcons in second WAFCON preparatory friendly
results.description: The Black Queens will continue preparations for the 2026 TotalEnergies Women's Africa Cup of Nations (WAFCON) with a high-profile international friendly against the Super Falcons of Nigeria on Saturda...

results.title: LaMelo Ball gives Timberwolves and Anthony Edwards a new answer to an old problem
results.description: MINNEAPOLIS — The atrium at Target Center has, in recent years, become the preferred venue for the Timberwolves to hold introductory press conferences.

results.title: Sources: Unimpressed Atleti end Greenwood talks
results.description: Marseille forward Mason Greenwood is nearing a four-year deal deal with Fenerbahçe after Atlético Madrid dropped their pursuit of the former Manchester United player -- saying he was unreachable, sources told ESPN.
